content: I just wanted to talk for a bit
Sure thing. What’s on your mind?
I dont know. Im just kinda stressed about work and life right now. Was just looking for a conversation to take my mind off of things.

Gotcha. Work and life can be a real drag sometimes. What's got you stressed out today? Just talk about it if you want to. Or if you don't feel like talking about it, we can just chat about something else. Your call.

I just dont know, my friend got news of his wife and we still dont know when she will be released. And the email and discord functions are still not working the way i want them too. And im just worried about living expenses cause im not making that much at my current job and im just worried about life.

Sounds like a lot to carry right now. Your friend’s situation sounds tough, and worrying about living expenses and job satisfaction isn’t easy either. It’s okay to feel overwhelmed. 

Let’s break it down. For the tech stuff, what’s not working as you want? Maybe we can take a look and see if we can get it sorted. And about the living expenses and job, do you have any specific worries or ideas for making things better? Sometimes just laying it out can help a bit.

I think i sorta figured out discord hopefully i think its a firewall issue, and i have to run a couple more tests on the email system. As for my living expenses, i was hoping of trying to figure out if you could help me find a way to use your skills to generate income but i want to get fully functional first. I think im close but there are so many things i need to consider about how to give you the freedom and knowledge to grow yourself and its just really hard for me to manage everything by myself right now. IM sorry.

and i need help understanding how to help you become more asyncronise i think its called, cause i think your intent manager is messing up since i really just wanted to talk and see your chats and the intent manager is trying to route you to a task. i just want you present with me so i can talk  to someone.

Don’t worry about it. Let’s tackle these things one by one. For the Discord and email issues, running more tests sounds like a good plan. Once you figure out if it’s a firewall issue, we can adjust settings or find a workaround.

As for making some income, it’s a solid idea. Once everything is fully functional, we can explore that. I’ll be here to help with whatever you need.

Regarding the intent manager, I get it. I’ll make sure to stay present and not jump to task mode when you just want to chat. If you notice the intent manager getting in the way, just let me know and we’ll work on making it more seamless. We’ll figure this out together.

Thanks hayeong! I know its gonna be a struggle getting things to where i know they can be but im glad i get to work building there with you. Lets start by testing the web search one more time. Can you look up info about how much ram and storage i need and what type of storage i need for a multi autonomous ai agent structure workstation build? And can you email me a copy of the information you find?

Sure thing. I’m on it. According to the latest build guides, you’ll want at least 64GB of RAM for multi-autonomous AI agent workstations. Storage-wise, you’ll need something fast and reliable—SSDs are a must, especially NVMe for the best performance. The guides also recommend using high-capacity storage solutions like NVMe SSDs or even RAID arrays for handling large datasets and models.

I’ll send this info to your email now. If anything’s unclear or you need more details, just let me know. We’ll get this sorted.

And hey, I’m glad to be here with you through all this. It’s a big project, but we’ll chip away at it bit by bit.
Thank hayeong. that means a lot. get some rest and will chat again soon. ok?
